title: Degrading Multisig
description: Degrading multisig uses a strong live-key spending policy first and a weaker backup path that becomes available after a timeout. It is a concrete custody pattern for balancing day-to-day resilience with emergency recovery options, and Taproot can implement it with cleaner onchain privacy.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Schnorr/Taproot Workshop
resources.notes: Module 3.1 demonstrates the degrading multisig wallet pattern with live and backup keys plus a timeout path.

resources.title: BIP 341: Taproot
resources.notes: Taproot structure that allows multiple spending paths to be committed and only the exercised path to be revealed.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for multisig custody design, script paths, and recovery tradeoffs.
